description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box containing flexible fabric bandages, branded with the up & up logo. The box is predominantly teal and white, with large, clear text indicating 'flexible fabric' and '30 sterile adhesive bandages assorted sizes.' The front and top surfaces display images of several tan-colored bandages, emphasizing the product inside. The box features a barcode, product code, and various informational labels, including size details and certification marks. The packaging is clean, with a modern design and a prominent blue heart-shaped logo. The box appears unopened and is likely lightweight, suitable for carrying in a bag or storing in a medicine cabinet.
description: A teal and white rectangular box of up & up flexible fabric bandages, featuring product images and clear branding. The packaging is modern, clean, and displays multiple bandages on the front.
description_view_0: The bottom of the box is visible, showing the up & up logo and mirrored text, with a teal background and no product images.
description_view_1: The left side of the box displays the product name, size information, and the up & up logo on a teal background.
description_view_2: The front of the box features the product code, bandage images, and the main branding, with a teal and white color scheme.
description_view_3: The right side of the box shows the bandage images, a certification mark, and the up & up logo, with teal and white colors.
attribute_brand_logo: The up & up logo, a blue heart-shaped arrow, is visible on multiple sides of the box, medium-sized, and printed in a simple, modern style.
attribute_packaging_design: The packaging is a rectangular box with a teal and white color scheme, featuring large, bold text, product images of tan bandages, the up & up logo, and various informational labels. The design is clean, with clear separation of text and graphics, and includes certification and product codes.
